eyebrow.zh: 开源 · 单二进制 · 本地 LAN
eyebrow.en: Open source · Single binary · Local LAN

headline.zh:
N 个 Coding Agent 的审批
收敛进一个手机队列
headline.en:
N coding agents' approvals
funnel into one phone queue

sub.zh: agentq wrap 套住每个会话，把审批提示按 ULID 排成一次只放一个的队列，扫码即可在手机上排空——不用再 alt-tab 找哪个 Agent 在等你。
sub.en: agentq wrap sniffs each session and orders every approval prompt into a one-at-a-time ULID queue you drain from your phone by scanning a QR — no more alt-tabbing to find which agent is waiting.

title.zh: N 个会话 → 一个队列

body.zh: 四个 tmux 面板里的 Claude Code 不再各自打断你——agentq 把它们的审批收敛成手机上一个按 ULID 排序、一次只放一个的队列，每条按 Agent 标记，扫一眼就知道该回答谁。
body.en: Four Claude Code panes stop interrupting you one at a time — agentq funnels their prompts into a single ULID-ordered, one-at-a-time queue on your phone, each tagged by agent so a glance tells you who to answer.

body.zh: agentq wrap 是一层很薄的 pty + stdio 嗅探器，--agent auto 同时识别 Claude Code 的方括号提示与 Cursor / Aider 的 (Y)es/(N)o 提示；接入一个新 Agent 只是再写一个适配器。
body.en: agentq wrap is a thin pty + stdio sniffer; --agent auto recognizes both Claude Code's bracket prompts and the (Y)es/(N)o dialect used by Cursor and Aider — adding a new agent is just one more adapter.

body.zh: 运行中的守护进程在 GET /schema/approval-envelope.json 上无鉴权发布协议契约；任何 Agent 运行时都能照 schema 校验后直接 POST /api/envelopes 进队列，完全不必让 wrap 去拦截 stdio。
body.en: The running daemon publishes its contract token-free at GET /schema/approval-envelope.json; any agent runtime can validate against the schema and POST /api/envelopes straight into the queue — no stdio scraping required.

body.zh: serve、wrap、attach 三个进程都跑在你自己的机器上：单文件 Go 二进制绑定 127.0.0.1:7777，用 bbolt 持久化，attach 打印本机 LAN 二维码——没有 Docker、没有 SaaS、没有外部数据库。
body.en: serve, wrap, and attach all run on your own machine: one static Go binary binds 127.0.0.1:7777, persists to bbolt, and attach prints a LAN QR — no Docker, no SaaS, no external database.

headline.zh: 别再 alt-tab 你的 Agent

sub.zh: 一条命令装上，扫个码，审批就都在手机上了。MIT 开源，单文件 Go 二进制。
sub.en: One command to install, one QR to scan, and every approval lives on your phone. MIT-licensed, a single Go binary.

tag.zh: MIT 开源 · 单文件 Go 二进制
tag.en: MIT open source · single Go binary
